_about: Deterministic, playable demo videos for the healthier Chrysalis feed. Loaded into the feed_videos table by scripts/seed_demo_videos.py. Metadata is intentionally written so the rule-based scorer + content taxonomy (core/labeling/taxonomy.py) classify each item into the intended content_category. chrysalis_scores is left null on purpose so the real scorer runs end to end. Each playable YouTube ID was checked with YouTube oEmbed and browser embed loading during Prompt 4; static csl-* fallback remains supported by the frontend but is no longer used by this seed set.

videos.title: 5-Minute Meditation You Can Do Anywhere
videos.description: A calm five-minute breathing and mindfulness reset. Slow down, breathe, take a break, and come back to your day refreshed.

videos.title: Yoga for Complete Beginners
videos.description: A beginner-friendly yoga session for stretching, calm movement, and a gentle reset. A low-pressure way to move your body.

videos.title: 10-Minute Morning Yoga Full Body Stretch
videos.description: A short morning stretch routine for fresh air energy, calm focus, and a gentle start before school or work.

videos.title: Nature, Beauty, Gratitude
videos.description: A reflective short talk about gratitude, wonder, nature, and noticing what is beautiful around you.

videos.title: Origami Butterfly Folding Instructions
videos.description: A calming paper craft tutorial. Make an origami butterfly step by step and create something small with your hands.

videos.title: Kindness Boomerang
videos.description: A heartwarming chain reaction of kindness, helpful moments, and people looking out for each other.

videos.title: A Pep Talk from Kid President to You
videos.description: An uplifting pep talk about encouragement, choosing awesome, and making today a little brighter.

videos.title: This Too Shall Pass - Rube Goldberg Machine
videos.description: A playful music video built around a giant chain-reaction machine. Fun, clever, and visually surprising.

videos.title: Marble Machine
videos.description: A marble-powered music instrument performance. Curious, upbeat, and satisfying without drama.

videos.title: The Art of Misdirection
videos.description: A funny, clever stage talk about attention, perception, and how people notice different things.

videos.title: What Adults Can Learn from Kids
videos.description: A low-conflict different perspective on learning, creativity, and listening to younger voices with an open mind.

videos.title: Where the Hell is Matt? 2012
videos.description: A joyful around-the-world dance video showing people, places, and traditions from many cultures.
